description_long: This lamp features a round, metallic base with a glossy, reflective finish, supporting a vertical stem that leads to a wide, conical lampshade. The shade is white with a green zigzag pattern encircling its lower half, and it is topped with a decorative brown cord or band that is looped through four evenly spaced points. The lamp's stem includes a circular accent or knob, possibly functioning as a switch, and a metallic support structure is visible beneath the shade. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with a blend of modern and classic elements. The lamp appears sturdy and is likely intended for placement on a table or desk in an urban indoor setting. Its materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and utility.
description: A table lamp with a glossy metallic base, a white conical shade featuring a green zigzag pattern, and decorative brown cord accents on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular accent on the stem and the full green zigzag pattern on the white shade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic stem and base, with the brown cord and shade details visible from an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shade and the metallic support, with the green zigzag pattern wrapping around.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stem, base, and the brown cord detail on the shade, with the circular accent partially visible.
